about.title: About Blackbox EYE™
about.subtitle: Military-grade cybersecurity for Danish enterprises
about.intro: Blackbox EYE™ delivers advanced cybersecurity solutions based on operational intelligence from special forces and elite units.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To protect Danish enterprises against advanced cyber threats through proven operational methodology and AI-driven analysis.

hero_section.title: Blackbox EYE™ – Intelligent security. Ready for action.
hero_section.description: We are a globally recognized specialist in advanced intelligence and security solutions. Our teams combine breakthrough technology, uncompromising discretion, and maximum reliability.

pillars.vision_body: To set the global standard for discreet security, analysis, and operational protection—with zero compromise.
pillars.mission_body: To protect, prepare, and strengthen our clients through unrivaled security solutions that stay ahead of today’s and tomorrow’s threats.

discretion.title: Discretion
discretion.body: We operate invisibly and relentlessly in the background—always one step ahead.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.body: Constant development and integration of next-gen technologies.

perfection.title: Perfection
perfection.body: Zero margin for error—every detail matters.

teams.title: Exclusive Special Teams
teams.description: For the most demanding missions, you can—under full confidentiality—deploy our specialized units. Each team works with a dedicated focus to eliminate even the most complex threats.

recon.title: Recon Team
recon.body: Deep intelligence, analysis, and information gathering alongside discreet field work.

red.title: Red Team
red.body: Realistic penetration tests and attack simulations—physical and digital.

stealth.title: Stealth Team
stealth.body: Undercover operations and discreet collection of critical intelligence.

blue.title: Blue Team
blue.body: Proactive experts in defense, security architecture, and threat response.

custom.title: Custom Operations
custom.body: Tailored missions based on your specific requirements—with maximum discretion and effect.

cta.title: Want to understand our operating model?
cta.description: Contact our Chief Intelligence Officer for a confidential brief or book a walk-through of our special teams.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: AI-driven cybersecurity solutions
products.intro: Blackbox EYE™ offers a complete suite of specialized modules to protect your organization.

hero_section.title: A holistic security strategy in one place
hero_section.description: Every module inside Blackbox EYE™ is a specialized line of defense. Use our AI assistant to generate concrete threat scenarios and see how we neutralize them.

greyeye.title: GreyEYE™
greyeye.subtitle: AI Security Assistant
greyeye.description: 24/7 AI-driven monitoring and incident response with natural language interface

idmatrix.title: ID-Matrix
idmatrix.body: Granular access control, live session monitoring, and biometric safeguards.

aut.title: AUT – Awareness & Training
aut.body: Scenario-based awareness training powered by AI and adaptive learning.

bridge.title: Operational Bridge
bridge.body: Integrate our platform with your existing SOC, SIEM, and workflows.

command.title: Live Command Center
command.body: Real-time situation rooms, mission control dashboards, and automated playbooks.

cta.title: Ready to see the modules in action?
cta.description: Book a confidential demo and we’ll show how Blackbox EYE™ deploys inside your environment without friction.

pve.title: PVE™
pve.subtitle: Penetration & Vulnerability Engine
pve.description: Automated penetration testing and vulnerability scanning

features.simulation: Adaptive threat simulation against emerging attacks

cases.title: Case Studies
cases.subtitle: Documented Impact
cases.intro: See how Blackbox EYE™ has helped Danish organizations strengthen their cybersecurity.

hero_section.title: Proven value in the real world
hero_section.description: See how we have neutralized critical threats for high-demand clients—and let our AI analyze your own situation.

municipality.title: Municipality with critical infrastructure
municipality.solution: ID-Matrix and GreyEYE implemented to log every access attempt and deliver weekly reports.

realestate.title: Real estate operator
realestate.challenge: Limited oversight across 12 sites and recurring theft.
realestate.solution: Platform integrated with existing cameras plus mobile access for facility managers.
realestate.result: 65% fewer theft incidents within three months.

security.title: Security firm
security.challenge: Manual logbooks and slow response time.
security.solution: GreyEYE now assists guards with automated documentation and live updates.
security.result: New differentiation lever in the market.

analysis.title: ✨ Analyze your situation
analysis.description: Briefly describe a security challenge inside your organization and our AI consultant will generate a targeted recommendation based on previous cases.
analysis.label: Your challenge
analysis.placeholder: E.g. 'We worry about phishing emails targeting our finance team...'

cta.title: Ready to create your next success story?
cta.description: Reach out for a confidential dialogue and receive an operational plan tailored to your risk profile.

pricing.description: Blackbox EYE™ offers complete license and subscription solutions – from selected modules to full operational integration. Use our AI security advisor to find the right match.
